description: Candidate gave a partial answer to main Q1, then when pushed for specifics on the idempotency upsert probe, says 'I'm not sure if I can answer that.' Meta-confession on a probe after partial coverage. From session 2115a63a turn 282.

judge_input.active_question_text: Using your primary iPaaS, how would you implement a near-real-time order sync from Salesforce to an on-prem ERP?
active_question_positive_evidence: Names specific platform components and connectors
Explains JSON/XML mapping with schema validation
Details reliability controls: retry with backoff, idempotency keys

active_question_rubric.excellent: Concrete iPaaS components, secure connectivity, reliability controls.

judge_input.active_question_evaluation_hint: Verify platform-specific depth and reliability controls.

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

active_question_remaining_probes.1: What connectivity approach would you use to reach on-prem (e.g., agent/VPN/reverse proxy), and how would you secure it?
active_question_remaining_probes.2: How would you structure environments and promote changes safely?
